prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.6 kg; Height 165.3 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.9%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 238mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 248mg/dL; current 239mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.8kg; 9 months ago 53.8kg; 6 months ago 52.2kg; 3 months ago 54.8kg; current 53.6kg), Height (12 months ago 165.3cm; 9 months ago 165.3cm; 6 months ago 165.3cm; 3 months ago 165.3cm; current 165.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 92U/L; 6 months ago 92U/L; 3 months ago 100U/L; current 99U/L), AST (12 months ago 74U/L; 9 months ago 78U/L; 6 months ago 79U/L; 3 months ago 70U/L; current 75U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 126mg/g; 9 months ago 138mg/g; 6 months ago 140mg/g; 3 months ago 159mg/g; current 140mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 103mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 104mg/dL; current 100mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 156mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.3g/dL; 6 months ago 12.3g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.48 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
